nasb.text: Six days later Jesus *took with Him Peter and James and John his brother, and *led them up on a high mountain by themselves.

esv.text: And after six days Jesus took with him Peter and James, and John his brother, and led them up a high mountain by themselves.

cnv.text: 過了六天，耶穌帶著彼得、雅各和雅各的弟弟約翰，領他們悄悄地上了高山。

ccb.text: 六天后，耶稣带着彼得、雅各和雅各的兄弟约翰暗暗地登上一座高山。

csbs.text: 过了六天，耶稣带着彼得、雅各和雅各的弟弟约翰，领他们悄悄地上了一座高山。
